reference: What ADHD medication is good for a five-year-old boy that will last in his system all day? He is currently on Ritalin twenty milligrams twice a day. He is at school all day, and when that first dose wears off, he is all over the place. He needs something that will stay in his system all day. At this point, he may not be moved to the next grade because of his ADHD. Please help!
text: What ADHD medication is good for a five-year-old boy that will last in his system all day? He is currently on Ritalin 20 milligrams once. He is at school all day, and when that first dose wears off, he is all over the place. He needs something that will stay in his system all day. At this point, he may not be moved to the next grade because of his ADHD. Please help.
